question: Which state is shown to have a higher prevalence of species Z based on the chart, NE or VT?

options.A: Both states have the same prevalence of species Z
options.B: VT has a higher prevalence of species Z
options.D: NE has a higher prevalence of species Z

explanation: The color legend is inverted, making lower values darker and higher values lighter. Although VT appears darker, NE has the higher assigned value when the inversion is considered.
